prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学校 管理回应与师德师风事件，但抖音热度排名第33（较热），短视频曝光量较高，整体关注度不低；2022年曾出现投档线异常信号（低关注），但未形成持续负面冲击；电子科学与技术A+、信息与通信工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、仪器科学与技术A-、光学工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，在电子信息领域实力突出，与招 生专业高度匹配；985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜2026年约第33名，近年排名稳定在28–33区间，属国内顶尖理工类院校。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类2026年高热推荐，计算机类推荐，电气工程高热推荐，与该校核心专业方向高度契合，报考热度持续升温；本省2026年普通高考总人数约20万，与2025年总考生数基本持平，物理类考生 规模估算约14.36万，竞争环境稳定；电子科技大学位于 四川成都，非本省高校，在辽宁招生占比约3.1%（2024年数据），无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年小幅缩招、学校顶尖工科实力与电 子信息类专业高热度的综合作用，在2025年基准1496名基础上预计竞争略有加剧（位次数字小幅增大）；预测最低位次约1501名，区间1276–1726名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2010 → 2318 → 1929 → 1585 → 1496, showing a fluctuating downward trend (decreasing ranking numbers, easing competition), with a cumulative advance of about 433 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1496. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 68 in 2021–2022, reduced to 60 in 2023–2024, 59 in 2025, and 58 in 2026, a slight reduction of about 1.7% compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving school management responses and teacher ethics incidents, but Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure and overall attention not low; in 2022, there was an abnormal signal in the admission score line (low attention), but it did not form a sustained negative impact; Electronic Science and Technology A+, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Instrument Science and Technology A-, Optical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding strength in the electronic information field, highly matching the enrollment majors; 985, 211, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is about 33rd, with stable rankings in the 28–33 range in recent years, belonging to a top domestic science and engineering university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, electronic information/communication majors are highly recommended, computer majors are recommended, electrical engineering is highly recommended, highly matching the core major directions of this university, with rising application popularity; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination students in this province in 2026 is about 200,000, basically the same as the total number of candidates in 2025, with the estimated size of Physics Category candidates about 143,600, a stable competitive environment; University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a provincial university, with an enrollment share in Liaoning of about 3.1% (2024 data), with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous advancement trend of historical rankings, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026, the university's top engineering strength, and the high popularity of electronic information majors, competition is expected to intensify slightly (ranking number increases slightly) based on the 2025 baseline of 1496; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1501, with a range of 1276–1726.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (AI Cross-Disciplinary Innovative Talent Dual Degree Training Program)
- Electronic Information (Information and Communication) (Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated System (National Demonstration Microelectronics College)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Engineering) (Electronic Science and Technology, Electromagnetic Field and Wireless Technology)
- Electronic Information Engineering (AI Cross-Disciplinary Innovative Talent Dual Degree Training Program)
- Electronic Information (Optoelectronic Integration and Optical Network) (Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Information Engineering)
- Automation (AI Cross-Disciplinary Innovative Talent Dual Degree Training Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics, Electrical Information, Intelligent Manufacturing) (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
- Electronic Information (Intelligent Instruments, Intelligent Control) (Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments)
- Software Engineering (Shahe Campus) (National Excellent Engineer Education and Training Program Special Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1276–1726, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1276), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Computer Science and Technology dual degree or flagship Electronic Information majors; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 1726), mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 mid-level majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1143 → 1397 → 1438, shifting backward for three consecutive years (ranking number increases, competition intensifies), with a cumulative backward shift of about 295 places; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1438; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 6 students in both 2023 and 2024, and 5 students in both 2025 and 2026, with 2026 remaining the same as 2025, resulting in no supply-demand elasticity impact from plan changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top domestic science and engineering institutions, which also has brand appeal for liberal arts candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but the Douyin popularity ranking is 33rd (relatively hot), indicating overall attention is not low; the History Category has few enrollment majors, and reputation fluctuations have a relatively limited impact on liberal arts applications; the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is known for its electronic information disciplines, but the History Category enrollment majors (Social Science Experimental Class, Foreign Languages and Literature) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines, and discipline evaluations do not directly cover them.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Foreign Languages and Literature is generally wait-and-see, while Law is diverging and wait-and-see; overall liberal arts major popularity is stable; the total number of candidates for the 2026 ordinary college entrance examination in this province is about 200,000, with the History Category candidate size estimated at about 56,400, roughly the same as 2025, with a slight increase in 2025 but not included as a correction basis; the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university, and the number of History Category enrollments in Liaoning is very small (5 students), so regional preference has a weak impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the combined effect of the university's brand appeal and stable liberal arts major popularity, competition is expected to continue to intensify slightly from the 2025 baseline of 1438; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1458, with a range of 1239–1677.

With rankings within the predicted range of 1239–1677, it is recommended to prioritize the Social Science Experimental Class as the main choice (Tier 1 sprint), and use Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety option; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, focus on sprinting for the Social Science Experimental Class.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 电子科技大学在辽宁省的医学类招生历史数据极为有限，仅2021年有完整记录。2021年医学类最低录取位次为19296名，总计划招生9人（临床医学7人、护理学2人）。2022年至2 025年连续四年均无'医学'单独招生批次数据，表明该校在辽宁省的医学类招生可能已并入物理类批次或暂停单独招生。2026年招生计划文件中亦未单列医学类计划，进一步印证 医学类在辽宁省的招生规模趋于缩减或不再单独设类。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 电子科技大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，位于四川省成都市。学校以电子信息科学技术为核心，工科实力突出，医学类专业 依托沙河校区办学，虽非传统医学院校，但借助学校整体品牌效应，仍具备一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续上升，临床医学尤为突出。电子科技大学在辽宁省的医学类招生规模极小（仅2个专业），且2021年后未见单独招生数据，反映出该校医学类在辽 宁的招生具有高度不确定性。考生若有意报考，需密切关注当年招生计划是否恢复或调整。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合仅有的一年历史数据及2026年无单独医学计划的现状，预测2026年电子科技大学在辽宁省的医学类最低录取位次约为19650名，较2021年略有下降（位次数字增大，竞争相对 缓和），波动区间为19200至20100名。

一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（沙河校区）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China has very limited historical data for medical enrollment in Liaoning Province, with only complete records in 2021. In 2021, the minimum admission rank for medical programs was 19,296, with a total planned enrollment of 9 students (7 in Clinical Medicine, 2 in Nursing). From 2022 to 2025, there were no separate enrollment batch data for 'Medicine' for four consecutive years, indicating that the university's medical enrollment in Liaoning may have been merged into the Physics category or suspended as a separate category. The 2026 enrollment plan document also does not list a separate medical category, further confirming that the scale of medical enrollment in Liaoning is tending to shrink or no longer set as a separate category.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, ranked among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province. The university focuses on electronic information science and technology, with strong engineering capabilities. Medical programs are conducted at the Shahe Campus. Although it is not a traditional medical school, it still has a certain appeal due to the overall brand effect of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has been rising, especially Clinical Medicine. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China has a very small enrollment scale for medical programs in Liaoning Province (only 2 programs), and no separate enrollment data has been seen since 2021, reflecting the high uncertainty of the university's medical enrollment in Liaoning. Candidates interested in applying should closely monitor whether the enrollment plan for that year is restored or adjusted.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the only year of historical data and the current situation of no separate medical plan in 2026, it is predicted that the minimum admission rank for medical programs at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Liaoning Province in 2026 will be approximately 19,650, slightly lower than in 2021 (rank number increases, competition relatively eases), with a fluctuation range of 19,200 to 20,100.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your rank is within the predicted range, it is recommended to use Nursing as a safety option, while Clinical Medicine requires a higher rank to attempt.
